questions.question: On 19 February 2025, which state’s cabinet approved the Bhoo Kanoon (Land Law Amendment Bill) to regulate the purchase and sale of agricultural, horticultural and residential land by non-residents?
Which State Government launched India's first ferret research facility in February 2025?
Who among the following launched the Ayushman Vay Vandana Card in Delhi in April 2025, along with Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta?
Who among the following was appointed as a Deputy Governor of the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) in May 2025?
Which department has notified rules for the use of radar equipment to measure vehicle speed under the Legal Metrology (General) Rules, 2011?
questions.option_2: Ministry of Road Transport and Highways
questions.option_3: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

questions.question: The US Army contingent that participated in Exercise YUDH ABHYAS held in September 2024 belonged to which of the following divisions?
Which DRDO-developed system, inducted into the Indian Army in 2024, played a crucial role in air defence during Operation Sindoor in 2025?
Which new electricity trading tool did India propose in 2025 to help companies meet renewable energy targets?
India has unveiled a comprehensive plan worth ₹9.15 lakh crore (US$ 109.50 billion) to enhance its power infrastructure and meet a projected demand of 458 GW by ____________.
Where was the 2025 Regional Forum on Sustainable Development (RFSD) for the UNECE region held on April 2–3?
Which Indian startup unveiled a system to run AI without advanced chips in April 2025?
In which of the following cities' suburban trains was Kavach 5.0 launched in April 2025 to enable more trains to run safely and efficiently?
Which neighbouring country did India accuse of supporting cross-border infiltration attempts in Jammu and Kashmir in early 2025?
Which Indian state had the highest Human Development Index (HDI) value according to the NITI Aayog's SDG India Index 2023?
Which of the following multinational air combat exercises did the Indian Air Force (IAF) participate in at Al Dhafra Air Base in the UAE from 21 April to 8 May 2025?
In March 2025, the Defence Ministry signed contracts with which two companies for the procurement of 155 mm/52 calibre Advanced Towed Artillery Gun System (ATAGS)?
questions.option_1: Larsen & Toubro Ltd and MTAR Technologies Ltd
questions.option_2: Bharat Dynamics Ltd and Hindustan Aeronautics Ltd
questions.option_3: Mahindra Defence Systems Ltd and Kalyani Strategic Systems Ltd
questions.option_4: Bharat Forge Ltd and Tata Advanced Systems Ltd

questions.question: Where was the BrahMos Aerospace Integration and Testing Facility inaugurated on 11 May 2025?
Which of the following countries will restrict the Mt. Everest Permit to only those who have already climbed 7000 m?
On 21 May 2025, the Director General of Health Services (DGHS) in Delhi was appointed to oversee the implementation of which two major healthcare initiatives?
questions.option_1: Ayushman Bharat Health Infrastructure Mission and Ayushman Arogya Mandir
questions.option_3: Fit India Movement and Swachh Bharat Abhiyan
questions.option_4: PM-JAY and National Digital Health Mission

questions.question: According to the PLFS Annual Report (July 2023–June 2024), which Indian state made history in 2025 by becoming the first to achieve full literacy?
In May 2025, who was appointed as Secretary, Department of Revenue, Ministry of Finance?
Which issue did the World Economic Forum highlight as the top immediate global threat in its 2025 Global Risks Report published in January 2025?
India's first exploration licence auction and AI-Driven Mineral Targeting Hackathon was launched in:
What is the name of the patented respiratory device developed by AIIMS Raipur to curb airborne infections in May 2025?
Which city is constructing a 27-metre-tall clock tower at Talkatora Roundabout to enhance its architectural identity?
